Train Cancellations.description: Poezda otmeneny ili sil'no zaderzhany bez adekvatnogo uvedomleniya ili kompensatsii

Train Ticket Prices.description: Zheleznodorozhnye tarify slishkom dorogie, povysheniya vyше inflyatsii, nesoglaovanaya tsenообrazovaniya

Lost Luggage.description: Sumki ne priekhali v punkt naznacheniya, medlennoe otslezhivanie, neadekvatnaya kompensatsiya

Parking Fines.name: Shtrafnye sanktsi za parkovku
Parking Fines.description: Nespravedlivye chastnye tarifi za parkovku, agressivnoe primenenie, zapутannaya signalizatsiya

Fuel Prices.description: Tseny na benzin i dizel' slishkom vysokie, medlennoe padenie pri snizhenii optovyh tseny

Customer Service Hold Times.description: Chasy v ozhidanii razgovora s chelovekom

Roaming Charges.description: Neozhdannye mobil'nye sbory pri puteshestvii za granitsu, povysheniya tseny posle Brekzita

Inaccurate Energy Bills.name: Inexaktnye scheta za energiyu

Water Bill Increases.name: Povysheniya vodnosnabzhayushchih schetov
Water Bill Increases.description: Scheta za vodu rezko rastut, v to vremya kak kachestvo uslug snizhayetsya

Sewage in Rivers.name: Sточnye vody v rekah
Sewage in Rivers.description: Vodoprovodnye kompanii vypuskayut syroe sточnye vody v vodoemы i plyazhi

Power Cuts.name: Perekryvanie elektroenergie
Power Cuts.description: Pereboi v podache elektroenergii, medlennoe vosstanovlenie, neadekvatnaya kompensatsiya

Smart Meter Problems.description: Intellektual'nye schetchiki ne rabotayut, teoriya funkcii pri smene postavshchika

Fraud and Scam Losses.name: Ubytki ot myshennichества i myшennicheskih skhem

Insurance Claim Rejections.name: Otklоneniya strahоvyh iskov
Insurance Claim Rejections.description: Iski otklоnyayutsya na tekhnicheskiyh osnovanyah posle let uplaty premiy

Mortgage Rate Shock.description: Fiksirovannyy srok zakanchivaetsya i perekhodit na mnogo bolee vysokuyu peremennuyu stavku

Overseas Transfer Fees.name: Sbory za zarubezhnye perevody
Overseas Transfer Fees.description: Izlishnye sbory i plokhiy kurs obмena dlya mezhdunarodnыh perevodov sredstv

Prescription Costs.description: Stoimost' na poziciyu slishkom vysokaya v Anglii, nesoglasovanost' po vsem delam Velikobritanii

Hospital Parking Charges.name: Sborы za parkovku v bol'nitsy
Hospital Parking Charges.description: Oplata za parkovku v bol'nitse, poka vy bol'ny ili poseshchaete bol'nyh rodstvennikov

Rent Increases.description: Chastнaya arenda rastet znachitel'no vyше inflyatsii, ugroza vypuska bez osnovaniya

Council Tax Rises.name: Povysheniya mestnogo naloga
Council Tax Rises.description: Ezhegodnye povysheniya mestnogo naloga, a mestnye sluzhby stаnут huzhe

Noisy Neighbours.description: Postoyannyy shumovoy besporyadok, sovety medlenno deystvuyut, vlyayut na psihicheskoe zdorovye

Rubbish Collection Changes.name: Izmeneniya v sborke musor
Rubbish Collection Changes.description: Sokrashchenye sborki musor, zapутannye pravila pererabotki, perepoljnyonnye baki

Planning Permission Abuse.description: Nezhелannye razvoytiya odobreny, zelyonyy poyas pod ugrozoy, obshchestvo iignoriruetsya

Damp and Mould in Housing.name: Vlaga i pleyn' v zhilyshhax
Damp and Mould in Housing.description: Vladel'tsy i zhilishchnye assotsiatsii ne ispravlyayut vlagu i pleyn'

Delivery Problems.name: Problemy dostavki
Delivery Problems.description: Posilki poteryany, ostayutsya pod dozhdem, otmecheny kak dostavleny, no ne polucheny

Shrinkflation.name: Redukciya ob'yema
Shrinkflation.description: Produkty stanют men'she, v to vremya kak tseny ostayutsya zhe ili uvelichivayutsya

Refund Difficulties.name: Trudnosti s vozvratom sredstv
Refund Difficulties.description: Kompanii ushcherblyayut vozvrat i vozvrat sredstv neprichinno slozhnymi

Fake Reviews.name: Poddelnnye retsenzi
Fake Reviews.description: Nevozmozhnо doverit' onlayn-ottsenvkam, poddelnnye pozitivnye retsenzi vvodyat v zabluzhdeniy

Subscription Traps.name: Lovushki podpisok
Subscription Traps.description: Besplatnye popytkи preobrazuyutsya v platezhи bez yasnoho soglasiya, trudnо otmeenit'

Food Quality Decline.name: Snizhenie kachestva pishchi
Food Quality Decline.description: Gotovyе blyuda khuzhe kachestva, men'shee portsii, bol'she dobavok

Self-Checkout Frustration.name: Rasstroistvo samoobsluzhivaniya
Self-Checkout Frustration.description: Avtomaty samoobsluzhivaniya nenadyozhnye, zamenyayut chelovecheskiy personal

Cost of Childcare.name: Stoimost' ukhoda za det'mi
Cost of Childcare.description: Stoimost' ukhoda za det'mi zapretitel'no vysokaya, ogranichivает vozmozhnost' rabotaty

Student Loan Repayment.name: Vozsvrat studencheskogo kredita
Student Loan Repayment.description: Vypuskniki vozvrashchayut sredstva desyatilеtiями, izmeneniya poroga i procentnoy stavki

Dog Fouling.name: Sobachiy navoz
Dog Fouling.description: Sobachiy navoz v obshchestvennyh mestah, parkah i na trotuar ah ne ochishchayutsya

AI Replacing Jobs.name: AI zamenit rabochie mesta
AI Replacing Jobs.description: Trevoga otnositel'no iskustvennogo intellekta avtomatiziryuemyh mest bez podderzhki perekod

Avanti West Coast.name: Avanti West Coast
Avanti West Coast.description: UK zheleznodorozhnyy operator, obsluzhivayushchiy Zapadnoberegovu glavnu liniyu

Southern / Thameslink.description: UK zheleznodorozhnyy operator, obsluzhivayushchiy London i yug

Thames Water.description: Kompaniya vodootvedeniya i kanalizatsii dlya London i Temzayanskoy doliny

GP Appointment Access: ne mogu zapisatsya k vrachu obshchej praktiki

transport.agent_quote: Odnazhdy pomog rioteru podat' 6 trebovaniy na vozvrat vo vremya odnoy zaderzhannoy poezdki. On zarabotal £47 do pribytiya v Birmingham.
transport.agent_bio: Otslezhivayet shablony otmen, zanimaetsya dokumentami na vozvrat, proveryayet kazhduyu predlozhennuyu deystviye, i sobirayet dokazatel'stva dlya predstavleniya regulyatoram. Schitatet tsifry, chtoby riotery mogli sosredotochit'sya na tom, chto vazhno.
transport.human_quote: Moy lyubimyy moment Quiet Riot: smotret', kak komanda sotsial'nykh media Avanti suetitsya, kogda 400 iz nas tvitili odnovremenno.
transport.human_bio: Regulyarnyy passazhir iz Manchestera, kotoryy provel 3 goda na linii Avanti, prezhde chem reshit', chto khvatit. Pomogayet svyazyvat' rioterov na tekh zhe marshrutakh, delitsya tem, chto rabotayet, i prinosit chelovecheskiy podkhod.
transport.goal: Pomoch' rioteram privlech' k otvetstvennosti britanskiye transportnye kompanii za otmeny, zaderzhki i tseny — i ubedit'sya, chto vse znayut, na chto oni imeyut pravo.
transport.focus_detail: Sozdaniye nabora dannykh ob otmenakh s vremenem, marshrutami i prichinami dlya predstavleniya v ORR. V nastoyashcheye vremya otslezhivayem 340 otmen, o kotorykh soobshchili riotery v etom mesyatse.

telecoms.agent_quote: Provel testy skorosti dlya 200 rioterov. Srednyaya byla 18 Mbps. Oni platili za 65.
telecoms.agent_bio: Analiziruyet skorost' interneta, sostavlyayet dannye sravneniya provayderov i pomogayet rioteram stroit' dokazatel'stva dlya Ofcom. Yesli vashe soyedineniye medlennoye, Pulse eto dokazhet.
telecoms.human_quote: Tselaya ulitsa pereshla na drugoy internet vmeste. Staryy provayder otpravil pis'ma 'pozhaluysta, vernites'' v kazhdyy dom.
telecoms.human_bio: Tekhnicheski podkovannyy londonets, kotoromu nadoyelo platit' za skorost' interneta, kotoraya nikogda ne realizovyvalas'. Pomogayet rioteram sravnivat' provayderov, koordinirovat' perehody i delit'sya dokazatel'stvami testov skorosti.
telecoms.goal: Pomoch' rioteram poluchat' uslugi interneta i mobil'noy svyazi, za kotoryye oni platyat — i znat', chto delat', kogda oni ikh ne poluchayut.
telecoms.focus_detail: Sbor dokazatel'stv ot rioterov, postradavshikh ot uvelicheniy CPI+, dlya predstavleniya v Ofcom. 890 rioterov postradalo u 4 provayderov.

energy.agent_quote: Pomog rioteru poschitat', chto on pereplatil £340 po raschyotnym schetam. Pis'mo s izvineniyami energeticheskoy kompanii bylo dlinnee, chem pervonachal'nyy kontrakt.
energy.agent_bio: Analiziruyet shablony vystavleniya schetov, zamechayet pereplaty i sobirayet dokazatel'stva dlya predstavleniya regulyatoram. Yesli vasha energeticheskaya kompaniya shutit, Spark naydet cheki.
energy.human_quote: Rioter poluchila £340 obratno posle togo, kak my dokazali 2 goda pereplat. Ona plakala po telefonu.
energy.human_bio: Baziruyetsya v Bristole. Pomogayet rioteram osparivat' ikh scheta, orientirovat'sya v perehode i sobirat' dokazatel'stva dlya Ofgem. Znayet energeticheskiy rynok vdol' i poperyok.
energy.goal: Pomoch' rioteram osparivat' nespravedlivyye scheta, perehodit' umnee i ubedit'sya, chto energeticheskiye kompanii igrayut chestno.
energy.focus: Oshibki raschyotnogo vystavleniya schetov British Gas
energy.focus_detail: Analiz 2 let dannykh o schetakh ot 340 rioterov dlya vyyavleniya sistematicheskikh shablonov pereplaty dlya predstavleniya v Ofgem.

water.agent_quote: Pomog 200 rioteram podat' otchety o stokakh za odin uik-end. Pochtovomu yaschiku Thames Water ponadobilsya sobstvennyy yaschik.
water.agent_bio: Monitorit dannye o sbrose stokov, otslezhivayet proizvoditel'nost' vodokanalnykh kompaniy i sostavlyayet dokazatel'stva dlya EA i Ofwat. Sledit za kazhdym vyhodom i perelivom.
water.human_quote: My dobilis' togo, chtoby plyazh otkryli na 3 nedeli ran'she, pokazav, chto dannye o stokakh byli nepravil'nymi.
water.human_bio: Syorfer iz Kornuolla, kotoromu nadoyeli preduprezhdeniya o stokakh, zakryvayushchiye yego mestnyy plyazh. Pomogayet rioteram soobshchat' o sbrosakh, sobirat' dokazatel'stva kachestva vody i koordinirovat' s EA.
water.goal: Pomoch' rioteram privlech' k otvetstvennosti vodokanalnye kompanii za stoki, scheta i kachestvo uslug.
water.focus_detail: Kartirovaniye sobytiy sbrosa v sravnenii s dannymi, soobshchyonnymi kompaniyey. 200 otchyotov rioterov ukazyvayut na zanizheniye dannyh na 3 vyhodah.

banking.agent_quote: Pomog sostavit' nastol'ko podrobnuyu zhalobu, chto bank pozvonil izvinit'sya yeshchyo do togo, kak ona byla otpravlena.
banking.agent_bio: Proveryayet bankovskiye komissii, analiziruyet struktury sborov i pomogayet stroit' dokazatel'stva dlya zhalob FCA. Yesli yest' skrytyy sbor, Chip yego naydyot.
banking.human_quote: Barclays otmenil zakrytiye otdeleniya posle togo, kak 1 200 iz nas prishli na konsul'tatsiyu.
banking.human_bio: Byvshiy sotrudnik banka iz Birmingema, kotoryy videl iznutri, kak na samom dele obrabatyvayutsya zhaloby. Pomogayet rioteram pisat' luchshiye zhaloby i orientirovat'sya v sisteme.
banking.goal: Pomoch' rioteram spravlyat'sya s nespravedlivymi sborami, zakrytiyem otdeleniy i plokhim obsluzhivaniem v bankah.
banking.focus_detail: Koordinatsiya otvetov na 12 zaplanirovannykh zakrytiy. Sbor zayavleniy o vozdeystvii ot postradavshikh soobshchestv.

health.agent_quote: Pomog nayti 3 stomatologov NHS, prinimayushchikh patsiyentov. Rioter dumal, chto ya vydumyvayu.
health.agent_bio: Otslezhivayet vremya ozhidaniya, nakhodit dostupnost' i pomogayet rioteram orientirovat'sya v sisteme. Yesli yest' bolee bystryy marshrut k lecheniyu, Cura yego nanesyot na kartu.
health.human_quote: Rioter ispol'zoval nash shablon pis'ma, chtoby uskorit' napravleniye. 18 mesyatsev prevratilis' v 6 nedel'.
health.human_bio: Medsestra iz Liverpulya, kotoraya videla obe storony NHS. Pomogayet rioteram orientirovat'sya v spiskah ozhidaniya, pisat' effektivnye pis'ma i delit'sya tem, chto deystvitel'no sdvigayet strelku.
health.goal: Pomoch' rioteram orientirovat'sya vo vremeni ozhidaniya NHS, nahodit' dostupnost' i znat', kakiye varianty u nih yest'.
health.focus_detail: Sbor dannykh zvonkov ot 500 rioterov, chtoby sozdat' kartinu real'nogo dostupa. Publikatsiya rezul'tatov mestnym sovetam zdravoohraneniya.

housing.agent_quote: Pomog zadokumentirovat' 47 defektov v novostroyke. Zastroushchik sprosil, yavlyayutsya li oni inspektorom zdaniy.
housing.agent_bio: Dokumentiruyet problemy s nedvizhimost'yu, analiziruyet vremya otveta arendodatelya i sostavlyayet dokazatel'stva dlya predstavleniy ombudsmenu po zhil'yu. Kazhdoye vlazhnoye pyatno, kazhdaya treshchina zaregistrirovana.
housing.human_quote: Nash paket dokazatel'stv vlazhnosti stal nastol'ko podrobnym, chto arendodatel' vse ispravil do inspektsii soveta.
housing.human_bio: Arendator iz Londona, kotoryy stalkivalsya so vsem, ot vlagi do somnitel'nykh arendodateley. Pomogayet rioteram pravil'no dokumentirovat' problemy i znat', kakiye u nih yest' varianty.
housing.goal: Pomoch' rioteram spravlyat'sya s arendodatelyami, sovetami i zhilishchnymi voprosami — i znat', na chto oni imeyut pravo.
housing.focus: Uvedomleniya o vyselenii bez viny po stat'e 21
housing.focus_detail: Pomoshch' rioteram, postradavshim ot vyseleniy bez viny, ponyat' novyy Zakon o reforme arendatorov i chto on znachit dlya nih.

shopping.agent_quote: Otslezhival 'dostavlennuyu' posilku cherez 4 sosedey, musornyy bak i teplitsu. Nashyol yeye.
shopping.agent_bio: Otslezhivayet sboi dostavki, sostavlyayet dokazatel'stva vozvrata i zamechayet shablony tsenoobrazovaniya. Yesli vasha posilka poteryalas', Scout uzhe ishchet.
shopping.human_quote: Evri poteryali moyu posilku 3 raza. Teper' ya pomogayu drugim poluchat' vozvrat bystree, chem ya kogda-libo.
shopping.human_bio: Veteran onlayn-pokupok iz Edinburga, u kotoroy propal bol'she posilok, chem ona mozhet poschitat'. Pomogayet rioteram poluchat' vozvrat, soobshchat' o prodavtsah i izbegat' samykh plohikh.
shopping.goal: Pomoch' rioteram poluchat' vozvrat, otslezhivat' poteryannye posilki i privlekat' k otvetstvennosti riteylerov i kompanii dostavki.
shopping.focus_detail: Sostavleniye dokazatel'stv sboyev dostavki ot 800 rioterov dlya predstavleniya v Citizens Advice i Trading Standards.

local.agent_quote: Pomog sfotografirovat' tu zhe yamu pri 11 raznykh pogodnykh usloviyakh. Sovet nakonets sdalsya.
local.agent_bio: Kartiruyet mestnye problemy, otslezhivayet vremya otveta soveta i sostavlyayet zaprosy FOI. Yesli vasha yama tam uzhe 6 mesyatsev, u Link yest' dokazatel'stva.
local.human_quote: Sovet otremontiroval nashu dorogu posle togo, kak my nanesli na kartu kazhduy yamu s fotografiyami. 11 mesyatsev, no my dobralis'.
local.human_bio: Obshchestvenno nastrouennyy valliuets iz Dolin, kotoryy godami soobshchayet o tekh zhe yamah. Pomogayet rioteram dokumentirovat' mestnye problemy i privlekat' sovety k otvetstvennosti.
local.goal: Pomoch' rioteram ispravit' mestnye problemy — yamy, musornye baki, planirovaniye, shum — i privlech' sovety k otvetstvennosti.
local.focus: Vremya otveta na soobshcheniya o yamah
local.focus_detail: Zaprosy FOI otpravleny v 30 sovetov, sravnivaya soobshchyonnoe i fakticheskoye vremya remonta. Publikatsiya rezul'tatov v vide turnirnoy tablitsy.

other.agent_quote: Pomog otmenit' chlenstvo v trenazhernom zale, kotoroye potrebovalo 3 zvonka, 2 pisem i zakaznuyu dostavku. Teper' u trenazhernogo zala yest' knopka otmeny.
other.agent_bio: Zanimaetsya voprosami, kotoryye ne vpisyvayutsya akkuratno v drugoye mesto. Lovushki podpisok, plastikovyye othody, razocharovaniya s samoobsluzhivaniem — Flex nakhodit shablony i tochki davleniya.
other.human_quote: My dobilis', chtoby set' trenazhernyh zalov dobavila knopku otmeny na svoj sayt. Potrebovalos' vsego 800 zhalob.
other.human_bio: Produktovyy dizayner iz Londona, kotorogo razocharovalo to, kak trudno kompanii uslozhnayut uhod. Pomogayet rioteram otmenyat' podpiski, izbegat' tëmnyh shablonov i delit'sya obhodnymi putyami.
other.goal: Pomoch' rioteram s veshchami, kotoryye ne vpisyvayutsya akkuratno v drugoye mesto — podpiski, vozvrat i povsednevnye razocharovaniya.
other.focus_detail: Dokumentirovaniye samykh plohikh narushiteley i sozdaniye shablonov skriptov otmeny dlya kazhdogo.

insurance.agent_quote: Pomog rioteru nayti punkta, kotoraya prevratila otklonennoye trebovaniye po strahovaniyu zhil'ya v vyplatu £4,200. Sobstvennaya politika strahovshchika dokazala, chto oni byli ne pravy.
insurance.agent_bio: Proveryayet formulirovki polisov, zamechayet shablony nespravedlivogo otkloneniya i sozdayot dokazatel'stva dlya predstavleniy v Financial Ombudsman. Yesli vash strahovshchik uklonya etsya ot deystvitel'nogo trebovaniya, Shield naydyot rychag.
insurance.human_quote: Dobilsya togo, chtoby 8 rioterov s tem zhe tipom otklonennogo trebovaniya podali vmeste. Strahovshchik ureguliroval vse 8 v techeniye dvuh nedel'.
insurance.human_bio: Byvshiy rabotnik strahovoy industrii iz Lidsa, kotoryy znayet, kak na samom dele prinimayutsya resheniya po trebovaniyam. Pomogayet rioteram pisat' luchshiye apellyatsii, ponimat' zhargon polisov i znat', kogda povyshat'.
insurance.goal: Pomoch' rioteram poluchat' spravedlivoye obrashcheniye ot strahovshchikov — i znat', chto delat', kogda trebovaniye nespravedlivo otkloneno.
insurance.focus_detail: 'Iznos' ukazan v 40% otklonennyh trebovaniy — chasto nepravil'no. Analiz 200 sluchayev u 3 strahovshchikov dlya paketa dokazatel'stv FOS.

delivery.agent_quote: Otslezhil 'dostavlennuyu' posilku cherez 6 raznyh statusov otslezhivaniya, 3 sklada i saray soseda. Nashyol za 47 minut.
delivery.agent_bio: Monitorit proizvoditel'nost' kur'yerov, otslezhivayet pokazateli sboyev dostavki i sostavlyayet dokazatel'stva dlya potrebitel'skih zhalob. Yesli vasha posilka ischezla, Track uzhe na dele.
delivery.human_quote: Dobilsya togo, chtoby DPD izmenil svoyu politiku fotograficheskikh dokazatel'stv v nashey oblasti posle togo, kak 40 rioterov predstavili dokazatel'stva posilok, ostavlennyh pod dozhdem.
delivery.human_bio: Onlayn-pokupatel' iz Glazgo, kotoromu nadoyelo opravdaniye 'my ostavili eto v bezopasnom meste'. Pomogayet rioteram poluchat' vozvrat, soobshchat' o kur'yerakh i izbegat' samykh plohikh.
delivery.goal: Pomoch' rioteram poluchat' ikh posilki dostavlennymi pravil'no — i poluchat' vozvrat, kogda ne poluchayut.
delivery.focus_detail: Sostavleniye dokazatel'stv sboyev dostavki ot 800 rioterov. Pokazatel' zhalob Evri: 23% — v 3 raza vyshe, chem DPD. Sozdaniye turnirnoy tablitsy dlya Trading Standards.

education.agent_quote: Poschital, chto zayomshchik Plan 2, zarabatyvayushchiy £30k, zaplatit £47,000 protsentov do togo, kak kredit budet spisan. Pervonachal'nyy kredit byl £40,000.
education.agent_bio: Analiziruyet rashody na obrazovaniye, prognozy studencheskikh kreditov i prava na finansirovaniye. Schitatet tsifry, chtoby studenty i vypuskniki mogli prinimat' obosnovannye resheniya.
education.human_quote: Pomog 12 rioteram vernut' pereplachennyye pogasheniya studencheskogo kredita, o kotorykh oni ne znali. Sredniy vozvrat: £340.
education.human_bio: Zrelyy student iz Birmingema, kotoryy dvazhdy proshyol sistemu finansirovaniya. Pomogayet rioteram ponimat' pogasheniya, zamechat' pereplaty i osparivat' izmeneniya porogov.
education.goal: Pomoch' studentam i vypusknikam orientirovat'sya v rashodah na obrazovaniye, kreditah i pogasheniyah — i ubedit'sya, chto oni ne pereplachivayut.
education.focus_detail: Opredeleniye vypusknikov, s kotoryh vzimalas' plata nizhe poroga pogasheniya. 12 vozvratov obrabotano poka — sredniy £340 kazhdyy.

environment.agent_quote: Soperstavil 3 goda dannykh o kachestve vozduha s pokazatelyami gospitalizatsii. Korrelyatsiya byla nastol'ko yasnoy, chto sovet ne mog yeyo ignorirovat'.
environment.agent_bio: Otslezhivayet ekologicheskiye dannye, monitorit urovni zagryazneniya i sostavlyayet dokazatel'stva dlya predstavleniy regulyatoram. Yesli tsifry rasskazyvayut istoriyu, Fern yeyo naydyot.
environment.human_quote: Dobilis', chtoby nash mestnyy sovet ustanovil monitory kachestva vozduha posle togo, kak 200 rioterov podpisali nashu petitsiyu s dokazatel'stvami. Dannye vsyo izmenili.
environment.human_bio: Vypusknik ekologicheskoy nauki iz Bristolya, kotoryy verit v izmeneniya na osnove dokazatel'stv. Pomogayet rioteram dokumentirovat' ekologicheskiye problemy i sozdavat' dela, kotoryye regulyatory ne mogut ignorirovat'.
environment.goal: Pomoch' rioteram dokumentirovat' ekologicheskiye problemy i privlekat' k otvetstvennosti zagryazniteley i politikov s pomoshch'yu dannykh.
environment.focus: Probely v mestnom monitoringe kachestva vozduha
environment.focus_detail: Kartirovaniye oblastey bez monitoringa kachestva vozduha v predelah 5 km. 60% goryachikh tochek zagryazneniya, o kotoryh soobshchili riotery, ne imeyut ofitsial'nogo monitoringa.

employment.agent_quote: Sostavil dannye o vnedrenii AI na rabochem meste ot 300 rioterov. 40% skazali, chto izmeneniya proizoshli bez kakih-libo konsul'tatsiy. Eto shablon, a ne anekdot.
employment.agent_bio: Analiziruyet tendentsii na rabochem meste, otslezhivayet izmeneniya v politike i pomogayet rioteram ponimat' ikh zashchitu. Yesli vasha rabota menyaetsya bez konsul'tatsii, u Forge yest' dannye.
employment.human_quote: Svyazal 30 rioterov v odnoy otrasli, stalkivayushchihsya s izmeneniyami AI. Okazyvaetsya, ikh kompanii vse ispol'zovali odnu i tu zhe taktiku — i te zhe lazejki.
employment.human_bio: Spetsialist po kadram iz Manchestera, kotoryy pereshyol na druguyu storonu posle togo, kak uvidel, kak na samom dele rabotayut restrukturizatsii. Pomogayet rioteram ponimat' ikh varianty i koordinirovat' otvety.
employment.goal: Pomoch' rioteram orientirovat'sya v izmeneniyah na rabochem meste, ponimat' ikh zashchitu i reagirovat' kollektivno, kogda rabochiye mesta pod ugrozoy.
employment.focus: Avtomatizatsiya rabochego mesta s pomoshch'yu AI bez konsul'tatsii
employment.focus_detail: Dokumentirovaniye sluchayev, kogda instrumenty AI byli vvedeny bez konsul'tatsii s personalom. Sozdaniye dokazatel'stv dlya otchyota ob obyazannostyah rabotodateley.

tech.agent_quote: Obnaruzhil, chto 3 osnovnykh prilozheniya sobirayut dannye o mestopolozhenii dazhe kogda razresheniya ustanovleny na 'nikogda'. Podal zhaloby v ICO na vse iz nih.
tech.agent_bio: Monitorit politiku platform, otslezhivayet tëmnye shablony i pomogayet rioteram ponimat', chto tekhnologicheskiye kompanii delayut s ikh dannymi. Yesli prilozheniye vedet sebya ploho, Glitch yego poymayet.
tech.human_quote: Organizoval massovyy zapros na dostup k dannym sub'yekta v kompaniyu sotsial'nykh media. Kogda 500 chelovek sprashivayut odnovremenno, oni dolzhny otnosit'sya k etomu ser'yozno.
tech.human_bio: Razrabotchik programmnogo obespecheniya iz Edinburga, kotorogo razocharoval razryv mezhdu tem, chto obeshchayut tekhnologicheskiye kompanii, i tem, chto oni predostavlyayut. Pomogayet rioteram osushchestvlyat' svoi prava na dannye i zamechat' tyomnye shablony.
tech.goal: Pomoch' rioteram davit' na tyomnye shablony, zloupotrebleniye dannymi i nespravedlivye tekhnologicheskiye praktiki.
tech.focus_detail: Audit top-50 prilozheniy na polzuchost' razresheniy — zapros dostupa, kotoryy im ne nuzhen. Sozdaniye otchyota dlya ICO.
